meta.scoring_note: 0-100 = weighted sum of three dimensions, each min-max scaled within the analyzed cohort (1.0 = best-in-cohort on that dimension); the score breakdown decomposes it exactly

engineers.narrative: Drove deep HogQL query-engine work: rewrote the ClickHouse funnel UDF onto a chunked RowBinary codec and rebuilt events predicate pushdown (lowering architecture, subexpression hoisting, serializable lazy joins), plus shipped the dmat materialized-column slot system end-to-end (Postgres, Django API, Temporal backfill).

evidence.title: feat: funnel binary
evidence.summary: Rewrote funnel ClickHouse UDF to chunked RowBinary codec with trends/steps variant binaries.

evidence.title: refactor(hogql): redesign events predicate pushdown on the lowering architecture
evidence.summary: Redesigned events predicate pushdown on HogQL lowering architecture, dropping redundant ifNull wrapping.

evidence.title: feat(dmat): part 2: batched backfill workflow
evidence.summary: Added Temporal batched backfill workflow for materialized columns with activity logging.

engineers.narrative: Built PostHog's engineering_analytics product end-to-end: a per-team-resolved curated warehouse read layer with typed MCP/UI endpoints over GitHub CI data, a React CI-analytics scene, plus a hogli CLI lazy-load refactor and an ASGI auth-gate fix.

evidence.title: feat(engineering_analytics): CI analytics scene
evidence.summary: Added read-only CI analytics frontend scene with routes, PR lifecycle and workflow-health views.

evidence.title: feat(engineering_analytics): private read layer + typed endpoints
evidence.summary: Built private curated read layer with typed contracts and named endpoints for engineering analytics.

evidence.title: feat(engineering_analytics): cost/friction lens + warehouse-shape fix
evidence.summary: Added CI cost/friction lens; fixed warehouse string/Nullable parsing that 500'd every endpoint.

engineers.narrative: Built out PostHog's Agent Platform end-to-end (Django product, MCP tool surface, Modal sandbox, approvals, AI gateway) and hardened core ingestion infra with env-driven Kafka cluster routing, CDP-to-Valkey dual-writing, and new ClickHouse metrics pipelines.

evidence.title: feat(agent-platform): core Agent Platform feature branch (all agent platform services)
evidence.summary: Consolidated all agent-platform services into the canonical long-lived feature branch.

evidence.title: feat: Setup kafka client routing via env vars
evidence.summary: Added env-driven per-topic Kafka cluster routing with router classes and semgrep guard.

evidence.title: feat: Setup dual writing for cdp services to valkey
evidence.summary: Added shadow Valkey dual-write/read pools mirroring CDP services for load testing.

engineers.narrative: Hardened PostHog's feature-flags auth and caching path: built a lazy per-token Redis auth cache with signal-driven and periodic-scan invalidation, preloaded flag-referenced cohorts into the flags hypercache, and added per-team flag-request body logging plus instance-setting audit logging.

evidence.title: feat(flags): add per-team request/response body logging
evidence.summary: Added opt-in per-team /flags request/response body logging in the Rust feature-flags service, polled via dynamic setting.

evidence.title: feat(flags): implement lazy per-token auth cache with targeted invalidation
evidence.summary: Built lazy per-token Redis auth cache; Python signals do targeted invalidation on token/user changes.

evidence.title: feat(flags): preload referenced cohorts in flags hypercache
evidence.summary: Preloaded flag-referenced cohorts (with transitive deps via BFS) into flags hypercache, skipping recalculation-only saves.

engineers.narrative: Built PostHog's native Rust HogQL parser to full C++ parity (parser-mode switching, direct-PyO3 AST path) and shipped query-engine wins: lazy-join predicate pushdown, query-time GeoIP fallback during the MaxMind incident, and a sandboxed AI coordinator that optimizes slow ClickHouse queries.

evidence.title: feat(hogql): add native Rust HogQL parser (rust-json backend)
evidence.summary: Added native Rust HogQL parser (rust-json backend) with parser-mode switching and CI release workflow.

evidence.title: feat(hogql): push down events predicates through lazy joins
evidence.summary: Added HogQL transform pushing events predicates into subqueries through lazy joins.

evidence.title: feat(hogql): two-sided rejection parity for the PBT diagnostic
evidence.summary: Drove Rust parser to full C++ parity, fixing rejection divergences and memory leaks.
